text: website: gpt copy for specific group sessions

ask chat how to implement booking different kinds of sessions (currently the website is only for the conversation) and best practice for booking for a client (they call or booking next one at the end of the session). Also ask if we should already track (per email/name/phone) - like track how many sessions they have left according to how much they paid: if enough, skip payment, otherwise demand payment step. Ask business wise how to set the installment thing - because I want to have the money for a session before I give it.
